title: Bedrock+
description: Bedrock+ is a modpack for Fabric Loaders that adds optimization, most Bedrock features (Textures, Behavior, etc.) and many more features to Java Edition!
body: Install Recent Versions Here: - Install Bedrock+ Here: (2.5.0) https://modrinth.com/modpack/bedrockplus/version/2.5.0 Bedrock+ is a modpack for Fabric Loaders that adds optimization, most Bedrock features (Textures, Behavior, etc.) and many more features to Java Edition! ## Mods and Features Bedrock+ - **Optimisation and Shaders** - Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore (2.0.0+) and Iris Shaders - **Bedrock Features** - Bedrockify, Armor Stand Poses, BE Style Wither, BedrockWaters, Cauldron Dying, Potion Cauldron, Controlify (1.0.0-1.0.0), Midnight Controls (2.0.0+), Jump Sounds, Bridging Mod, Chunk Fade-in (2.0.0+), Snowy Leaves (2.0.0+) - **Customisation** - Cosmetica - **Bedrock Textures** - Bedrockify and Vanila Tweaks - **New Features and Textures** - Vanila Tweaks, Auto Correct - **Fixes** - Model Gap Fix, Vanila Tweaks, Java Edition Features, Memory Leak Fix - **Mod Settings** - Mod Menu - **Config APIs** - Fabric API, Cloth Config API, YetAnotherConfigLib ### VanilaTweaks Downloads: (You can download them here for free because the modpack got rejected once. But they're still included in the mod) - Resource Packs: https://vanillatweaks.net/share#JDmz8Y - Data Packs: https://vanillatweaks.net/share#NeqHzU - Crafting Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/share#mgNE8f Access Cosmetica Customisation Here: https://cosmetica.cc/ If there is any mod I have added but haven't listed or there's an issue, please let me know on Discord: https://discord.gg/8GmtjzAHgx ## Changelog: Release 2.5.0 - Removed Versions 1 and 2 - Removed BedrockLite - Added More Features from VanilaTweaks - Credited VanilaTweaks and added download links Release 2.0.0: - Chunk Fade-In - Removed Controlify - Snowy Leaves - Better Optimisation Release 1.0.0: - Released Modpack. ## Future Features - Forge Support - Neoforge Support - Cloth Support - Bedrock Title Screen - Bedrock Options Screen **(Do NOT use this modpack in most Minecraft servers (Hypixel, TubNet, etc.) You will get banned.**} **Bedrock+ - Made by StarryTheSuperstar** Credits: Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
